description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a flat, smooth tabletop and a set of three drawers on the right side, each featuring a recessed handle for easy access. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid vertical panel, while the right side is anchored by the drawer unit, providing both stability and storage. The desk has a minimalist design, with clean lines and a neutral color palette, making it suitable for professional or home office environments. The drawers are likely constructed from the same material as the rest of the desk, offering ample space for organizing office supplies or personal items. The surface appears to be made of laminated wood or engineered wood, giving it a hard, durable finish. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or attached accessories, indicating that the desk is in new or well-maintained condition.
description: A modern, rectangular desk with a smooth tabletop and three right-side drawers, supported by a solid left panel. The design is minimalist and functional, with a neutral color scheme and recessed drawer handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, three right-side drawers with handles, and the solid left support panel.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the drawer unit, with no handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the drawer unit and the left support panel, with no handles or openings visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid support panel and the edge of the tabletop, with the drawers not visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers and handles, with the solid panel on the left and the drawer unit on the right.
